libraryRulesApplication.note: When using library code, apply the rules from that library's rules/index.json
libraryRulesApplication.clarification: Library rules apply to code imported from those libraries

browserRequirements.description: Requirements for the final rendered pages in the browser

unbreakableRules.rule: Forms work without JavaScript in the browser
Navigation works without JavaScript in the browser

details: All applications MUST work offline to the extent practicable
Sync when online, work when offline
No functionality should break just because network is unavailable

unbreakableRules.rule: Everything must be responsive in the browser
details: Pages adapt from mobile (320px) to 4K displays
Touch targets minimum 48x48px on touch devices
Text remains readable without horizontal scrolling
No fixed-width layouts that break on any device
